title: Bug fixes: deferred option exits + orphaned SL reattachment + test isolation

strategic_gate_check.win_rate_trend_understood: IN PROGRESS — need 40+ signal-driven closed trades for IC correlation

deliverables.detail: execute_sell_option() was deferring exits to _pending_option_exits when the options market was closed, but flush_pending_option_exits(ib) was never called — deferred exits were silently abandoned. Fixed: added flush_pending_option_exits(ib) call in bot_trading.py run_scan() after update_trailing_stops(). The function was already fully implemented; only the call site was missing.

Stop-loss orders on positions (e.g. GSAT, LUNR) could be cancelled by dashboard close_position() with no mechanism to re-submit them. Fixed: added SL reattachment logic in reconcile_with_ibkr() — on startup/reconnect, for any recovered stock position, the bot now scans ib.openTrades() for a live STP/TRAIL order (reattaches its ID) or submits a new GTC outsideRth StopOrder if none is found.

Added: (1) market hours gate at top defers to _pending_option_exits, (2) EXITING status check to skip duplicate exit attempts, (3) retry gating BEFORE setting EXITING (not after) so a cooldown skip doesn't lock the position, (4) status reset to ACTIVE in except block on all failure paths.

learning._save_orders() lacked the /dev/null fallback that _save_trades() already had. tempfile.mkstemp(dir='/dev/') fails with [Errno 1] on macOS. Added the same fallback pattern: catch exception, fall back to direct open(target, 'w') write. This unblocked test isolation in the full suite.

Added 4 tests verifying execute_sell_option bid-pricing and retry-discount logic: attempt 0 uses bid, retry 1 uses bid*0.95, retry 2 uses bid*0.90, cooldown reset stays on bid path. Root cause of full-suite isolation failure: test_orders_guard.py::test_no_syntax_errors_at_import calls importlib.reload(orders), replacing sys.modules['orders'] with a fresh module object. test_orders_core.py's module-level `orders` reference became stale, so patch('orders.LimitOrder') targeted the wrong module. Fixed by using sys.modules['orders'] directly in _run_sell() to always operate on the live module.

gate_decision: KEEP — no new features. Bug fixes only. Next check at 40 signal-driven closed trades.
